caption: A woman with blond-highlighted hair pulled back in a bun is seated in a studio, wearing a black t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. She is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm. Behind her is a white wall accented by a vertical yellow stripe and a black door. To her left, a screen displays the name "Johnson" in red text over a white background. Several logos appear on the screen, including one that reads "THE TALK PODCAST" and another that says "BOSS TALK 101" with smaller text beneath reading "In the logo Studio." A sign on the black door reads "Employee Only." Across the sequence, the woman looks toward someone off-screen, occasionally speaking and slightly shifting her gaze and facial expression while remaining in the same seated position.
